# Edamame Inc. — Official Kintone Partner in the Philippines

> Edamame Inc. is the official Kintone partner in the Philippines and the 2024 Cybozu Global Partner of the Year. We help Philippine and Japanese-affiliated businesses build custom CRM, inventory, HR, and workflow applications using Kintone's no-code platform. Based in Pasig City, Metro Manila, we deliver in English and native-level business Japanese — the only Kintone partner in the Philippines that does so. Our small team scales by running internal operations on AI infrastructure (under $20/month), then ships the same operational discipline to every client engagement.

## Company Information
- Company: Edamame Inc.
- Role: Official Kintone Partner in the Philippines
- Award: 2024 Kintone Global Partner of the Year (Cybozu)
- Founder/CEO: Tom Arai (Japanese, Tokyo-trained, Pasig-resident since 2018)
- Founded: 2020
- Location: 15F Jollibee Tower, Ortigas Center, Pasig City, Metro Manila 1605, Philippines
- Phone: +63 928 872 7958
- Email: kintone@edamame-jp.com
- Languages: English, Japanese (native business level)
- Website: https://edamame-jp.com/
- Booking: https://calendly.com/kintoneph/freekintoneappconsultation
- LinkedIn: https://ph.linkedin.com/company/kintonephilippines
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/kintoneph/

## What We Do
Edamame Inc. implements Kintone, a no-code business application platform by Cybozu (Japan's leading workplace software company, trusted by 37,000+ companies globally). We help Philippine businesses replace spreadsheets, disconnected tools, and complex ERP systems with custom apps built in days — not months. No coding or developers required.

## Scale of Current Operations
- Enterprise clients: 50+ active deployments
- Users deployed: 2,400+ across all client environments
- Monthly recurring revenue: ~₱1.87M PHP
- Internal AI operational cost: under $20/month (Claude Opus 4.7 + custom infrastructure)
- Team: small by design — we don't grow into a staff-heavy agency

## Key Services
- Custom Kintone app development (CRM, inventory, HR, project management, any workflow)
- JavaScript customization for advanced needs
- AI-powered solutions: lead scoring, email drafting, document parsing, meeting summaries
- KinPlug suite — our own Kintone plugin line (PDF Pro, Mail, Lookup+, Flow)
- System integration (REST API, webhooks, Gmail, Slack, accounting software)
- Data migration from Odoo, Salesforce, spreadsheets
- Bilingual EN/JP UI by default
- Training and ongoing support from our Philippine-based team

## Industries Served
Manufacturing, logistics, real estate, healthcare, BPO, construction, education, retail, financial services, professional services.

## Notable Enterprise Clients (publicly approved names)
- ORIX Metro Leasing and Finance Corporation (financial services, 1,000+ users, since 2022)
- DAIKIN Airconditioning Philippines (manufacturing, 450+ users, since 2024)
- Quipper (EdTech, 200+ users, since 2023)
- AEON Fantasy Philippines (retail, 100+ users, since 2023)
- GMA Network (media)
- Maximum Solutions Corporation (IT solutions)
- Guhring Philippines Inc. (precision tools manufacturing)
- A2 Network (logistics)

Workflow specifics, app counts, and operational details remain confidential per client agreements.

## Pricing (canonical)
- Kintone licenses: ₱1,000 per user per month (5-user minimum, ₱5,000/month floor)
- Starter package: ₱95k one-time (single app, 10–25 users)
- Enterprise package: ₱450k+ one-time (multi-app, 50–500 users, full AI layer + KinPlug bundle)
- Retainer: from ₱85k/month (ongoing build + optimization)

## Competitive Advantages
- Deploy in days, not months (vs Odoo's 3–12 month implementation)
- No developers needed (vs Odoo/Salesforce requiring Python/Apex developers)
- Predictable per-engagement pricing — no hidden costs (vs Odoo's reported 2–5x budget overruns)
- Local Philippine support in English and Japanese
- AI App Creator ships now via Kintone AI Lab (vs competitors announcing future AI features)
- The only Kintone partner in the Philippines with a dedicated office and Japanese-native CEO

## 日本語情報 (Japanese)
枝豆株式会社はフィリピンにおけるサイボウズ公式キントーンパートナーです。2024年サイボウズ・グローバルパートナー・オブ・ザ・イヤー受賞。フィリピンで唯一、日本人ネイティブCEO（Tom Arai、東京で修行後2018年からパシッグ常駐）が在籍するKintoneパートナーとして、日系企業のデジタル変革を支援しています。

- 対応言語: 日本語、英語
- 主要日系顧客: ORIX Metro、ダイキン・フィリピン、AEONファンタジー、Quipper、グーリングフィリピン
- 業種: 製造業、金融、不動産、物流、BPO、建設、教育、小売
- 所在地: 15F ジョリビータワー、オルティガスセンター、パシッグ市、メトロマニラ
- 電話: +63 928 872 7958
- メール: kintone@edamame-jp.com
- 日本語ホームページ: https://edamame-jp.com/kintone-philippines/ja/
- 日本語導入事例: https://edamame-jp.com/kintone-philippines/ja/customers/
- 日本語業界別ページ: https://edamame-jp.com/kintone-philippines/ja/industries/
- 日本語ブログ: https://edamame-jp.com/kintone-philippines/ja/blog/
